testsuite.name: GlobalExceptionHandler (notifications) - Tests del manejador de errores

testcase.name: handleRuntime: mensaje null retorna 400 sin NullPointerException

testsuite.system-out:
2026-05-29T17:08:31.512-05:00 WARN 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : RuntimeException en notifications: No existe una notificación con id: 1 2026-05-29T17:08:31.514-05:00 WARN 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : RuntimeException en notifications: Error interno 2026-05-29T17:08:31.515-05:00 WARN 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : RuntimeException en notifications: El tipo no puede estar vacío 2026-05-29T17:08:31.517-05:00 ERROR 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Error inesperado en notifications: Error inesperado en el servidor
